goals.title: Reposition the Conitens dashboard Floor Overview components using ben...
goals.objective: Reposition the Conitens dashboard Floor Overview components using benchmarked open-source agent-management UX patterns. Implement the layout in the existing dashboard without new dependencies, preserve Focused and Classic behavior, prove with tests/build and real browser QA at 1440px and 1220px, update Conitens context docs, and leave cleanup receipts/no-commit evidence because the worktree already contains unrelated dirty changes.

successCriteria.scenario: Browser use: start the dashboard dev server on an isolated port, open #/office-preview, select Floor Overview, and verify at 1440x900 and 1220x900 that the shell exposes floor-command-center, the overview inspector rail is visible beside the floor map, the map remains wider than the inspector, and no horizontal overflow occurs.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: output/playwright/floor-overview-oss-ux-results.json plus output/playwright/floor-overview-oss-ux/floor-overview-{1440,1220}.png, with cleanup receipt for browser context, dev-server pid, and bound port.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: browser PASS output/playwright/floor-overview-oss-ux-results.json; screenshots output/playwright/floor-overview-oss-ux/overview-1440.png and overview-1220.png; overview-1220 floor 869px vs rail 260px, overflow=false | cleanup: killed dev-server pid 30489; browser QA script closed CDP browser and removed user-data-dir; port 3014 not responding; closed agents 019ec1f7-3f93-7b50-90a5-95b161088a26 019ec1f7-454d-7103-9fdd-8a99cf4ef212 019ec1f7-4ac3-7ac0-9245-e3cae67b3324 019ec1f8-fdd7-71b0-b133-c56fb23de736

successCriteria.scenario: CLI/test: run the RED placement contract first, then after implementation run targeted dashboard tests covering office preview shell, sidebar view model, spatial lens grammar, and room dressing.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/floor-overview-oss-ux-red.txt and .omo/evidence/floor-overview-oss-ux-targeted-tests.txt showing the expected RED failure before code and passing targeted tests after code.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: RED evidence .omo/evidence/floor-overview-oss-ux-red.txt failed on missing floor-command-center; GREEN targeted tests .omo/evidence/floor-overview-oss-ux-targeted-tests.txt pass 31/31 | cleanup: no runtime spawned for CLI tests

successCriteria.scenario: Regression/build/docs: run full dashboard tests and production build, confirm Focused remains workbench-dominant and Classic remains viewport-dominant, update Conitens context docs and record no-commit evidence due pre-existing unrelated dirty changes.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: full dashboard tests .omo/evidence/floor-overview-oss-ux-dashboard-test.txt pass 143/143; build .omo/evidence/floor-overview-oss-ux-dashboard-build.txt pass; context docs updated; no-commit evidence .omo/evidence/floor-overview-oss-ux-no-commit.txt; ai-slop report .omo/evidence/floor-overview-oss-ux-ai-slop-cleaner.txt | cleanup: no runtime spawned for test/build; reviewer agents closed

goals.blockedReason: Implementation and all three criteria passed, but final complete checkpoint is blocked by stale completed Codex goal objective mismatch in this thread; see get_goal legacy objective and CLI reconciliation error.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/floor-overview-oss-ux-20260614/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/floor-overview-oss-ux-20260614/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
